name: pit-fail-open-vs-closed
notes: Fail-open and fail-closed are DIFFERENT paths and must not be confused. A corrupt store makes `compare` fail CLOSED: it abstains with comparability none, reason store-corrupt, kind failed -- it does not guess a comparison. A held advisory lock makes `run` fail OPEN: it degrades to transparent passthrough (no report, child exit passed through) -- veridelta is never worse than its absence. The same store trouble routes to opposite, correct behaviors depending on the command.

steps.content: this is not a valid run id line -- store corrupted
